inputs.label: Annual Salary
inputs.businessContext: Total annual gross salary before deductions. Used to compute daily wage for leave and severance calculations.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Standard working days per year (typically 260 for 5-day workweek). Used to derive daily wage.

inputs.label: Accrued Annual Leave Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of unused annual leave days accrued. Based on employment contract or local labor law.

inputs.label: Years of Service
inputs.businessContext: Total years of continuous employment. Used for severance pay calculation (often capped at certain years).

inputs.label: Severance Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks of severance pay per year of service. Typically defined by labor law or contract (e.g., 2 weeks per year).

inputs.label: Notice Period Days
inputs.businessContext: Contractual or statutory notice period in days. Used to calculate pay in lieu of notice.

inputs.label: Terminated with Cause
inputs.businessContext: If true, severance may be reduced or waived per labor law. Affects severance calculation.

inputs.label: Jurisdiction
inputs.businessContext: Select applicable labor law jurisdiction. Different rules for leave, severance, and notice.

rules: If isTerminatedWithCause is true, severanceMultiplier should be 0 (check jurisdiction)

thresholds.accruedLeaveDays > 30: High accrued leave balance may indicate poor leave management
thresholds.yearsOfService > 20: Long service may trigger additional statutory benefits
thresholds.noticePeriodDays > 90: Extended notice period may be unusual; verify contract

suggestedActions: Review leave policy to reduce accruals
Consider phased retirement for long-service employees
Verify notice period compliance with local law
